Title: Minimalist Celestial Pattern Baseball Cap - Adjustable Hat
Description:
Embrace a touch of cosmic elegance with our Celestial Pattern Baseball Cap. Featuring a delicate, repeating constellation and zodiac motif, this hat is designed for those who appreciate subtle, artistic details.

The hat is crafted from a soft, durable material that provides comfort and breathability, making it perfect for all-day wear. Its adjustable strap ensures a customized, comfortable fit for all head sizes.

  • Style: Modern and versatile, perfect for casual outings, festivals, or adding a sophisticated accent to your everyday look.
  • Design: Features an all-over print of minimalist celestial elements—stars, moons, and zodiac symbols—on a crisp, neutral background.
  • Comfort: Light, breathable fabric that feels comfortable against the skin.
  • Fit: Adjustable strap allows for easy sizing and a perfect fit every time.

This cap makes an excellent gift for astronomy lovers, boho enthusiasts, or anyone who loves wearable art. Pair it with your favorite denim jacket or summer dress for a effortlessly chic look.

Material & Care

Made with high-quality, breathable fabric. Machine wash cold for easy care.
